top_opportunity.name: ASX Small-Cap AI Screener Report — Paid Subscription
top_opportunity.description: Sell weekly AI-generated ASX small-cap screening reports as a recurring subscription. Product already exists and has been run (8 companies found). Charge $19/month (basic) or $49/month (pro with email alerts). Distribute via Bluesky teasers, HotCopper forum, Aussie Stock Forums, and ASX Tribe Discord. The Australian retail investor niche is structurally underserved — Strawman is waitlisted, Finviz covers fewer than 24 ASX stocks, and no automated narrative screener exists at this price point.
top_opportunity.estimated_time_to_revenue: 24-48 hours (Stripe checkout live + community post same day)

estimated_mrr.ceiling_note: 100 subs at blended $29/mo = $2,900 MRR / $34,800 ARR — solo-founder profitable

why_this_wins: Product already built and validated — screener is live, report generated, 8 companies found
Stripe already active — zero payment infrastructure work needed
Bluesky presence for organic distribution via teaser posts
Market gap confirmed: Strawman waitlisted, Finviz covers <24 ASX stocks, no automated narrative screener
Motley Fool AU charges $39-$836/yr proving Australians pay for curated stock research
Gumroad is a zero-friction backup: 10% flat cut, no monthly fee, instant listing (gumroad_listing_asx_tracker.txt already started)
Australian small-cap niche: ownable quickly, large enough to monetise
27 agents can automate weekly report generation, delivery, and social posting end-to-end
action_steps: Create 2 Stripe products today: 'ASX Small-Cap Monthly' at $19/mo and 'ASX Small-Cap Pro' at $49/mo
Publish landing page (single HTML) with 3-company free teaser from existing report + Stripe checkout CTA
Post on Bluesky: share the 3 teaser companies with brief rationale, link to subscribe for full report
Post in HotCopper and Aussie Stock Forums with free teaser offer for first 10 members
Join ASX Tribe Discord and share demo report in relevant channel
Wire Stripe webhook to email delivery (SendGrid) — auto-send full report on payment_succeeded event
Schedule ASX screener to run every Monday pre-market and auto-generate next report
Add ASIC disclaimer: 'Educational data tool only, not financial advice' — follow Motley Fool AU model
top_opportunity.key_risk: ASIC licensing — providing financial product advice requires AFS licence in Australia. Mitigate by framing as 'data screening and educational research tool', not personal financial advice. This is standard practice for Motley Fool AU and similar services.

all_opportunities.name: ASX Small-Cap AI Report Subscription (Stripe/Gumroad)
pros: Product already exists and has run successfully
Clear market gap — Strawman waitlisted, Finviz ASX coverage near zero
Bluesky + HotCopper + Discord distribution ready now
cons: ASIC compliance framing required (manageable)
Small initial Bluesky audience
Requires ongoing quality to retain subscribers
all_opportunities.action: Create Stripe products today, post teaser on Bluesky and HotCopper, wire SendGrid delivery

all_opportunities.name: RapidAPI Listing — ASX Screener API
pros: Developer audience with credit cards ready
cons: RapidAPI takes 25% cut
Requires wrapping screener as a clean REST API
First paying customer typically 1-3 weeks, not 24-48h
Setup time ~4-8 hours
Nokia acquired RapidAPI (2024) — platform direction uncertain
all_opportunities.action: Wrap ASX screener as REST API, upload OpenAPI spec to RapidAPI, set freemium + $9/mo paid tier

all_opportunities.name: AI Tool Affiliate Program Promotion (via Bluesky)
pros: High commissions: Copy.ai 45%, GetResponse 40-60%, Jasper 25% recurring
Can start today with Bluesky posts
cons: Revenue lags by weeks — depends on follower conversions
Small current Bluesky audience limits reach
Not product-led — relies on content marketing
Commissions are secondary income not primary MRR
all_opportunities.action: Sign up for Copy.ai and Jasper affiliate programs today, create 3-5 Bluesky posts demonstrating tools

all_opportunities.name: Sell Single Report PDF via Gumroad
pros: Zero platform fee until sale (10% only on sale)
Good for one-time buyers before they subscribe
cons: One-off revenue, not recurring
Gumroad revenue highly concentrated — 99.5% to top 1% of sellers
Requires driving traffic externally
Less valuable than subscription model long-term
all_opportunities.action: List existing ASX report PDF on Gumroad at $9-$19, post link in communities as low-friction entry point

all_opportunities.name: Fiverr/Upwork AI Automation Audit Gig
cons: Time-to-first-buyer is unpredictable — often weeks for new sellers
Competitive category
Requires human availability to deliver audit
Platform takes 20% (Fiverr) or 20% on first $500 (Upwork)
Not automatable — time for money model
all_opportunities.action: Create Fiverr gig: 'AI Workflow Automation Audit — I'll analyse your business processes and deliver an AI automation roadmap'

all_opportunities.name: Anthropic Claude Partner Network (Enterprise Referral)
pros: $100M committed by Anthropic to partners in 2026
High referral fees for enterprise deals
cons: Enterprise B2B sales cycle is 3-12 months
No public commission rates — negotiated
Requires established consulting or enterprise relationships
Not a 24-48 hour play — possibly 6+ months to first dollar
all_opportunities.action: Apply at anthropic.com/referral to get partner status for future pipeline — not primary revenue play now

all_opportunities.name: Product Hunt Launch
pros: Free exposure to tech-savvy early adopters
cons: Real data: 400 signups often yields only $237 and 1 paying customer in first 4 days
Requires weeks of community warm-up for good ranking
Traffic spike then silence — not sustainable alone
Wrong audience for ASX investing niche
all_opportunities.action: Plan a Product Hunt launch for month 2 after validating product with first 20 paying subscribers

all_opportunities.name: Newsletter Sponsorship (as the sponsor-seller)
pros: Can earn $500-$3,000 per placement at 5K-50K subscribers
cons: Requires building an audience FIRST
Cannot earn sponsorship revenue without existing list
3-12 months to build meaningful subscriber base
Not a first-revenue play
all_opportunities.action: Launch Beehiiv or Substack newsletter now, grow to 1K+ subscribers over 2-3 months before pitching sponsors
